signals.headline: Morgan Stanley Launches First Major Bank Spot Bitcoin ETF | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Morgan Stanley Launches First Major Bank Spot Bitcoin ETF | YES | HIGH confidence**

Morgan Stanley's MSBT launched on Tuesday, April 15, 2026, with $34 million in day-one inflows, placing it in the top 1% of all ETF launches historically.[1] This represents a watershed moment for institutional adoption, providing a regulated onramp for pension funds and wealth managers.

signals.headline: Technical Breakout Opens Path to $80K-$85K | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Technical Breakout Opens Path to $80K-$85K | YES | MED confidence**

Bitcoin's breach of $75,000—aligning with the 100-day moving average—has opened technical targets toward $85,000, contingent on sustaining institutional ETF flows and ceasefire stability.[3] However, $6 billion in leveraged shorts remain concentrated at $72,200-$73,500, creating cascade liquidation risk if prices reverse.[1]
